Front: Problem: Encode and Decode Strings (Medium) | Link: https://neetcode.io/problems/string-encode-and-decode | Trigger: serialize list of arbitrary ASCII strings and decode exactly
Back: Pattern: Length-prefixed encoding. Aha: delimiter-only split is unsafe because payload may contain delimiter. Logic: encode each string as len#string; decode by parsing len until # then slicing exact len chars. Edge cases: empty string, empty list, strings containing delimiter symbols. Complexity: O(total_chars) time, O(total_chars) space.
